title: Chapter 54
content:

Then I kept pushing her until she was backed against the wall.

Haa

Haa

I just...

The old me was ignorant.

A healthy horse girl’s breasts have just as much elasticity as a well-kneaded, softened mousepad!

While rubbing her right breast with my left hand, I kept sucking on her left.

Horse milk is apparently rich in nutrients like cow’s milk and is drunk in some regions.

A horse girl’s milk should be just as nutritious.

But...

"No matter how much I suck... nothing comes out... Iferaski..."

"Haa"

Haa

Haa

Haa

Is this the piss Lucia did earlier?!"

But it was already almost tasteless.

...That’s right.

Since the milk came out from inside and soaked through, there should still be some left on the inside.

I don’t know. Maybe if I grope her breasts I can figure out the structure?

...?!

Amazing. Even while her own breasts were being sucked by a beast girl, she could still worry about other beast people. What a wonderful person. Iferaski, you bad girl, sucking the breasts of such a noble person without permission.

Good. With this, Rafilia-san shouldn’t realize she was lactating.

I also gave a reason for why Iferaski was licking her. It was a harmless lie that hurt no one.

*Clang clang.*

From far away, the faint sound of a bell could be heard.

"Ah! Please excuse me for a moment."

A short while later, the sound of the bell came from above as well. It was the evening bell telling people it was time to sleep since it was already night.

Ringing the bell multiple times every day—morning, noon, and night—for the sake of the townspeople must be tough. A fine clergy member like her fainted, yet Iferaski still selfishly sucked on her breasts. Maybe she needs some moral education.
